channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Can You Romance Characters in Neverness to Everness? NTE Romance, Explained
item.content:encoded:
Neverness to Everness has a heap to explore and some eye-catching characters to meet, which understandably raises questions on whether there are romance options in the game.

Romance in gaming has become a popular pastime for players, allowing them to create a deeper bond with fan-favourites, as well as the potential to unlock exclusive missions, dialogue, and rewards.

If you’re wondering whether romance is available in Neverness to Everness, Insider Gaming has all the details you need.

Can You Romance Characters in Neverness to Everness?

Yes, romance options are available in Neverness to Everness, with a host of characters available to interact with and date.

Spending time with specific characters and handing them gifts boosts the character’s Bond Affinity System, unlocking additional rewards, dialogue moments, and encounters with them.

  • More Insider Gaming: How to Spawn Headless Rider Anomaly Boss in Neverness to Everness

Interactions for dates include going for a walk holding hands, driving around the city, riding a ferris wheel, and unlocking specific side stories with the character to complete.

Don’t expect any lewd scenes, however, as there are no such offerings in Neverness to Everness, and while romance is available, it remains suitable for a 13+ audience, with the main content advisory reasons being moderate violence and in-game purchases.

All Romance Characters in Neverness to Everness

All major characters in the launch roster are available to date, including fan favorites Mint, Aurelia, and Chiz.

Each character has likes and dislikes, with specific gifts boosting your Affinity Bond with them, so it’s worth looking into if you’re keen on rapidly progressing through the bond levels with a specific character.

  • More Insider Gaming: Where to Find The Witch House in Neverness to Everness

One guarantee to boost the bond of any character, however, is to hand them a Handwritten Letter, available in the Warp Exchange Circle Bounty.

The table below features all of the romance characters available in Neverness to Everness, and a few of their favourite gifts.

What’s your favourite feature in Neverness to Everness? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more Neverness to Everness, find out how to play with friends in multiplayer, and check out all of the active codes to redeem.

MOBILE APP

item.title: All Far Far West Codes & How to Redeem Them
item.content:encoded:
Far Far West is another breakout ‘friendslop’ game with a great concept and an even better look and feel. If you’re looking for monthly codes for Far Far West, you may be left feeling a bit disappointed for now.

The friendslop term has become an endearing one, with developers and publishers openly embracing the genre coinage; it’s a sign of acknowledgement that it works, and it’s spawned so many popular multiplayer games.

One of 2026’s newest additions is Far Far West, so let’s dive into codes information.

Far Far West devs have revealed that the game doesn’t have any monthly codes at present.

I said you might be left disappointed, and that’s because Far Far West doesn’t have monthly codes for you to pick up free items and goodies.

Confirmation comes from the official Far Far West Discord.

  • More Insider Gaming: All NTE: Neverness to Everness Codes & How to Redeem

Under the title’s FAQ, a question asks: ‘Can I ask for promo codes?’ The answer is a simple one for now:

‘There are no promo codes for the moment. Please do not request them in the general chat.’

This guide is up, though, in the event that Far Far West will get monthly codes. When it does, I will update this page, and Insider Gaming will bring you all the latest Far Far West codes and how to claim them.

The most logical assumption for Far Far West not having monthly codes right now is due to the title being an early access game.

This doesn’t apply to everyone and everything, but games being in early access means the team behind the game is more focused on delivering a solid, working game for customers who’ve committed to helping a new game at first with early access.

  • More Insider Gaming: NBA 2K26 Locker Codes: All Active Codes For April 2026

The FAQ doesn’t elaborate on the lack of monthly codes, but it could well be something we either see during early access at some point or closer to the 1.0 release.

Are you still enjoying Far Far West regardless of a lack of monthly codes? What makes it stand out from other friendslop games in recent years? Share your thoughts on the game with us through the Insider Gaming Discord.

Check out our updated monthly code lists for other games:

  • WWE 2K26 Locker Codes: All Active Codes For April 2026
  • All Escape from Tarkov Codes—Active Reward Codes and Free Items
  • Pokémon Champions Codes: All Active Mystery Gift Codes & How to Redeem Them

Written by

Evergreen Editor

Andy is Insider Gaming's Senior Evergreen Editor and has been in the games journalism sphere in one way or another for over 7 years. His video game taste is as…

More from Andrew Highton

item.title: Rebellion’s Atomfall Being Turned Into TV Series
item.content:encoded:
A TV adaptation of Atomfall is officially in the works, with Two Brothers Pictures attached to produce the series.

Developed by Rebellion, Atomfall is a post-apocalyptic adventure set in the British Lake District. The game follows a protagonist suffering from amnesia as they navigate a mysterious Quarantine Zone in the aftermath of a nuclear disaster.

More On The Atomfall Series

The news was broken exclusively by Deadline, as they revealed that the show will be co-produced by Two Brothers and Rebellion. Harry and Jack Williams, Emmy and Golden Globe-winning writer-producers, will write the series.

Speaking on the adaptation, the pair highlighted the game’s distinctly British identity and atmospheric setting, noting how exciting it has been to expand its unsettling world for television—particularly as two brothers collaborating with another pair of brothers.

Rebellion founders Jason Kingsley and Chris Kingsley will serve as executive producers. The duo praised the writers’ passion for the source material, revealing that they were impressed by their personal experiences with the game and their own interpretations of its ending.

The project is in its earliest stages of development, as there’s no suggestion of casting details or series length, let alone a potential release window for the show. Even so, Atomfall joins an ever-growing list of video game adaptations, with the likes of God of War and Tomb Raider also in production.

Will you be watching the Atomfall TV series when it eventually arrives? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more gaming news, check out PlayStation’s response to the DRM issues, as well as the Invincible VS day one patch notes.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: CyvOph joins Fnatic after Veqaj Benching
item.content:encoded:
Fnatic Valorant has announced the signing of Clément ‘CyvOph’ Millard from rivals Team Vitality to complete their roster for VCT EMEA Stage 1.

Cyv0ph replaces Veqaj in Fnatic Valorant roster

CyvOph replaces another Frenchman, after Sylvain ‘Veqaj’ Pattyn was benched after missing Fnatic’s Stage 1 clash with GIANTX due to “health issues.”

The organization shared, “After discussions with Veqaj we have decided to move him to the inactive roster while he takes some time away from competition.”

The news left Fnatic without a piece going into their final match of the regular season against BBL, before their vital Upper-Bracket Semi-Final starts their playoff run, which will decide whether the org gets to play their home event at Valorant Masters London.

So, the roster does not have a lot of time to work out how to best use CyvOph and integrate the Frenchman in the roster. Nevertheless, the player seemed unbothered about the magnitude of the task ahead, sharing his excitement at joining Fnatic on social media.

“Hellllllo, I’m back. I’m so happy to join this club with these exceptional players, and too excited to go on stage with them. Thanks so much for this opportunity. See u tomorrow.”

How will CyvOph fit in at Fnatic?

As a flex player, CyvOph’s flexibility will need to be shown as Fnatic prepares to integrate him into the roster.

Veqaj’s time at Fnatic saw the Frenchman play a selfless role to set up Fnatic’s stars elsewhere, with Kajetan ‘kaajak’ Haremski, Austin ‘crashies’ Roberts, and Emir ‘Alfajer’ Ali Beder taking more responsibility after Timofey ‘Chronicle’ Khromov’s departure.

In that sense, his job may be made easier by the solo nature of certain spots, which will prevent a need for strong synergy on the Defending side.

BBL will be a tough test on Thursday, as the VCT EMEA Kickoff winners shocked Fnatic in their opening contest of the year, winning the split.

The matchup is an interesting test, due to the clash of Fnatic’s methodical tactics and BBL’s outright aggression.

The player will only have a short time to impress, even in the best-case scenario, with Fnatic’s future still uncertain after Veqaj’s benching.

To discuss all things Valorant, join Insider Gaming’s Discord!
For more news, see the backlash for Fnatic’s CS skin gambling website, STASHD.

Darragh is an Esports Journalist for Insider Gaming specialising in Counter-Strike. He loves to explore how esports teams work, or why they very often do not.

More from Darragh Harbinson
